text:
lax is well-connected to public transportation networks, making it easy to reach the airport without a car. travelers can access metro buses, trains, and rideshare services like uber and lyft from frontier lax terminal, providing a range of options for onward travel within los angeles and beyond.
https://airportsterminalhub.com/airlines/frontier-airlines/frontier-airlines-los-angeles-international-airport-lax-terminal/
